name: The Edge Of The World Z (Will Shock You) حافه العالم زيد
short_description: THIRD PERSON SHOOTER GAME (ZOMBIE AND SCI FI stories)COLLECT WEAPONS AND FRIENDS TO FIGHT , SURVIVE AND SAVE THE WORLD. THAT HAVE BEEN CAPTURED BY ENEMIES , COMPLETE MISSION AND LOT OF LEVELS(FROM EASY TO HARD) THIS GAME CONTAIN ARENA AND SPECIAL STORY ) .
detailed_description:
THIRD PERSON SHOOTER GAME (ZOMBIE AND SCI FI stories)COLLECT WEAPONS AND FRIENDS TO FIGHT , SURVIVE AND SAVE THE WORLD. THAT HAVE BEEN CAPTURED BY ENEMIES , COMPLETE MISSION AND LOT OF LEVELS(FROM EASY TO HARD)
THIS GAME CONTAIN ARENA AND SPECIAL STORY ) .




*SINGLE PLAYER:
-STORY IN THE BIGGNING AND IN THE END OF THE GAME
-LEVEL SYSTEM FROM EASY TO HARD
-FANTASTIC GRAPHIC
-MISSION SYSTEM

*ARENA OF DEATH:
-FIGHT ENEMIES IN ROUNDS(ROUNDS GO FROM EASY TO HARD)
